lyrics.text: I used to rule the world
lyrics.translation: 大千世界曾由我主宰

lyrics.text: Seas would rise when I gave the word
lyrics.translation: 巨浪也曾因我之命澎湃

lyrics.text: Now in the morning I sleep alone
lyrics.translation: 而今我却在黎明独自入眠

lyrics.text: Sweep the streets I used to own
lyrics.translation: 在曾属于我的街道落寞徘徊

lyrics.text: I used to roll the dice
lyrics.translation: 过去我常常孤注一掷

lyrics.text: Feel the fear in my enemy's eyes
lyrics.translation: 尽情品味惊恐在死敌瞳孔绽开

lyrics.text: Listen as the crowd would sing:
lyrics.translation: 欣然倾听百姓高歌喝彩

lyrics.text: "Now the old king is dead! Long live the king!"
lyrics.translation: “先王亡矣！”“新王万代！”

lyrics.text: One minute I held the key
lyrics.translation: 曾经我手握权位经脉

lyrics.text: Next the walls were closed on me
lyrics.translation: 如今才知宫墙深似海

lyrics.text: And I discovered that my castles stand
lyrics.translation: 恍然发现我的城池

lyrics.text: Upon pillars of salt, pillars of sand
lyrics.translation: 基底散如盐沙乱似尘埃

lyrics.text: I hear Jerusalem bells are ringing
lyrics.translation: 听那钟声从耶路撒冷传来

lyrics.text: Roman Cavalry choirs are singing
lyrics.translation: 罗马骑兵唱诗班的歌声震彻山海

lyrics.text: Be my mirror my sword and shield
lyrics.translation: 担当我的明镜，利剑和盾牌

lyrics.text: My missionaries in a foreign field
lyrics.translation: 我的传教士屹立边疆之外

lyrics.text: For some reason I can't explain
lyrics.translation: 只因一些缘由我无法释怀

lyrics.text: Once you go there was never, never an honest word
lyrics.translation: 一旦你离开这里便不再,不再有逆耳忠言存在

lyrics.text: That was when I ruled the world
lyrics.translation: 而这便是我统治的时代

lyrics.text: It was the wicked and wild wind
lyrics.translation: 凛冽邪风呼啸袭来

lyrics.text: Blew down the doors to let me in.
lyrics.translation: 吹散重门使我深陷阴霾

lyrics.text: Shattered windows and the sound of drums
lyrics.translation: 断壁残垣礼崩乐坏

lyrics.text: People couldn't believe what I'd become
lyrics.translation: 世人不敢相信我已当年不再

lyrics.text: Revolutionaries Wait
lyrics.translation: 起义大军翘首期待

lyrics.text: For my head on a silver plate
lyrics.translation: 有朝一日我站上断头台

lyrics.text: Just a puppet on a lonely string
lyrics.translation: 恰如傀儡随吊线寂寞摇摆

lyrics.text: Oh who would ever wanna be king?
lyrics.translation: 悲哉，谁又曾渴望万人膜拜？

lyrics.text: I hear Jerusalem bells are ringing
lyrics.translation: 听那钟声从耶路撒冷传来

lyrics.text: Roman Cavalry choirs are singing
lyrics.translation: 罗马骑兵唱诗班的歌声震彻山海

lyrics.text: Be my mirror my sword and shield
lyrics.translation: 担当我的明镜，利剑和盾牌

lyrics.text: My missionaries in a foreign field
lyrics.translation: 我的传教士屹立边疆之外

lyrics.text: For some reason I can't explain
lyrics.translation: 只因一些缘由我无法释怀

lyrics.text: I know Saint Peter won't call my name
lyrics.translation: 我亦知天堂之门不会为我敞开

lyrics.text: Never an honest word
lyrics.translation: 不再有逆耳忠言存在

lyrics.text: But that was when I ruled the world
lyrics.translation: 而这便是我统治的时代

lyrics.text: (Ohhhhh Ohhh Ohhh)
lyrics.translation: (哦哦哦)

lyrics.text: Hear Jerusalem bells are ringing
lyrics.translation: 听那钟声从耶路撒冷传来

lyrics.text: Roman Cavalry choirs are singing
lyrics.translation: 罗马骑兵唱诗班的歌声震彻山海

lyrics.text: Be my mirror my sword and shield
lyrics.translation: 担当我的明镜，利剑和盾牌

lyrics.text: My missionaries in a foreign field
lyrics.translation: 我的传教士屹立边疆之外

lyrics.text: For some reason I can't explain
lyrics.translation: 只因一些缘由我无法释怀

lyrics.text: I know Saint Peter won't call my name
lyrics.translation: 我亦知天堂之门不会为我敞开

lyrics.text: Never an honest word
lyrics.translation: 不再有逆耳忠言存在

lyrics.text: But that was when I ruled the world
lyrics.translation: 而这便是我统治的时代

lyrics.text: 电吉他 : Jonny Buckland
音频助理 : Andy Rugg/Brian Thorn/Chris Allgood/Daniel Green/Vanessa Parr
低音吉他 : Guy Berryman
合成器 : Guy Berryman
打击乐 : Will Champion
木吉他 : Chris Martin
混音助理 : William "Will" Hensley
